creator: dwmalone@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-bugs->gibbs

Justin - do you know if any of the changes between 4.1.1 and 4.4 are likely 
to have fixed this problem? They are seeing a message: 
AHC0; AHC_INTR - referenced SCB not valid during SELTO SCB(15, 12) 
on heavy disk access.
